title: sphaeranthus gallensis
intro: Sphaeranthus gallensis, also known as the African spider flower or Sphaeranthus, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus gallensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Sphaeranthus gallensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used in topical creams and ointments to promote wound healing and skin health.
